Section text:
## 重度游戏大幅简化日常并融合休闲玩法

通过“一键委托”或“资源追赶”等机制大幅压缩日常耗时，同时可植入部分休闲副玩法，提供独特的休闲乐趣和独立的奖励（多为外观、社交道具）。

message.content:
This section answers questions regarding core game design trends, specifically daily routine simplification and casual gameplay integration. It addresses:
- **Topics & Claims:** The design shift toward significantly reducing daily time commitments in heavy/core games while embedding casual sub-modes to enhance player experience.
- **Procedures & Mechanisms:** How daily playtime is compressed using "one-click delegation" (一键委托) and "resource catch-up" (资源追赶) systems.
- **Entities & Features:** Casual sub-gameplay modes and their associated reward structures.
- **Reward Types:** Independent rewards provided by casual modes, primarily consisting of cosmetics (外观) and social items (社交道具).
- **Dates, Definitions, Metrics, Tables, Figures, & Evidence Types:** None explicitly provided or detailed in this section.

response_text:
This section answers questions regarding core game design trends, specifically daily routine simplification and casual gameplay integration. It addresses:
- **Topics & Claims:** The design shift toward significantly reducing daily time commitments in heavy/core games while embedding casual sub-modes to enhance player experience.
- **Procedures & Mechanisms:** How daily playtime is compressed using "one-click delegation" (一键委托) and "resource catch-up" (资源追赶) systems.
- **Entities & Features:** Casual sub-gameplay modes and their associated reward structures.
- **Reward Types:** Independent rewards provided by casual modes, primarily consisting of cosmetics (外观) and social items (社交道具).
- **Dates, Definitions, Metrics, Tables, Figures, & Evidence Types:** None explicitly provided or detailed in this section.
